_comment: FAIL-path test for muezzin.mjs. Step 1 writes nothing but declares a checkpoint — proves the gate BLOCKS and does not advance.
name: muezzin-fail-gate-test

steps.description: Shell command succeeds but writes no artifact — checkpoint should FAIL and block.
steps.command: node -e "console.log('step ran but wrote no artifact')"

steps.description: This step must NOT run — if it does, the gate failed to block.
steps.command: node -e "console.error('GATE FAILED: step 2 ran despite step 1 checkpoint failure'); process.exit(1)"
